name: Picadillo Con Alcaparras (Picadillo with Capers)
recipeIngredient: 2 lb Ground beef (chuck or top round)
1 large Ripe tomato; peeled, seeded, and finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a large skillet over moderate heat until hot.
2. Add ground beef and brown, turning occasionally, until the meat is no longer pink.
3. In a bowl, combine onion, tomato, garlic, bay leaf, crushed oregano, and capers.
4. Add the cooked meat to the bowl and mix well.
5. Pour in wine vinegar, tomato sauce, Burgandy wine, hot sauce, brown sugar, and nutmeg; stir until combined.
6. Add olives cut into thin rounds, then pour water over the mixture.
7. Season with salt if needed.
8. Cover and cook on moderate heat for about 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
9. Uncover and continue cooking for another 5 minutes.
10. If liquid is not absorbed after 30 minutes, simmer uncovered until evaporated.
11. Serve over long grain white rice and ripe fried plantains, if desired.
